questions.question: Describe the role of the correlation engine in a SIEM system and name two correlation techniques it uses.
expectedPoints: Analyzes events to identify potential security incidents
Rule-based correlation: predefined rules trigger alerts
Behavioral correlation: detects deviations from normal activity patterns

questions.question: Compare and contrast on-premises and cloud-based SIEM deployment architectures, discussing at least three advantages and disadvantages of each approach.
expectedPoints: On-premises: complete control, high upfront costs, maintenance burden
Cloud-based: lower upfront costs, automatic scaling, third-party data handling
Scalability approaches for different deployment types
